records.summary: ValidationSourceIssueMaterializer owns exact @aurelia/validation source-rule DSL and model-rule hydration diagnostics.
records.rationale: @aurelia/validation throws several framework errors from source-authored fluent rule construction, property-accessor parsing, model-rule hydration, and group-rule callback shapes. Semantic-runtime now owns the closed static subset as ValidationIssue products and app diagnostics, while live custom rule execution and serialized payload surfaces remain intentionally separate future products.
guidance: Start here before adding validation diagnostics or changing validation framework-error dispositions.
Use framework.errors for the validation package and the framework validation sources before spending another AUR41xx authority row.

Keep validation source-rule diagnostics separate from validation-html binding behavior; validation-html template semantics should stay in template/binding lanes unless the issue is genuinely rule-source owned.

AuthoringOrientation may report validation ownership from positive validation-html `& validate` applications, validation package configuration admissions, validation service resolve sites, or validation source-rule issue rows; do not confuse that taste signal with the narrower ValidationIssue diagnostic product lane.

The generated `validated-state-backed-form` authoring recipe is the positive ownership canary for validation-html: it should materialize `validate` through `BindingBehaviorApplications`, expose any static validation trigger through `staticArgumentValues`, satisfy `validation-controller-usage`, and avoid producing ValidationIssue diagnostics.

`dynamic-keyed-validation` is the contrastive validation-html pressure canary: repeat-local keyed writes such as `person[field] & validate` and nested keyed writes such as `person[addressField][line1Field] & validate` should remain analyzable as binding-behavior applications plus runtime-assignable two-way data flows without becoming a generated authoring recommendation.

Current exact source-owned codes are AUR4101 rule_provider_no_rule_found, AUR4102 unable_to_parse_accessor_function, AUR4105 hydrate_rule_unsupported, AUR4106 hydrate_rule_invalid_name, and AUR4108 group_rule_invalid_execution_result.

Do not claim AUR4100, AUR4103, or AUR4104 until semantic-runtime admits serialized validation payloads; do not claim AUR4107 or AUR4109 until it admits live validation rule execution or custom rule return values.

anchors.summary: Validation lane ownership and remaining intentionally unclaimed authorities.
Recommendable validation-html authoring fixture with positive validation ownership.
Pressure fixture for the exact validation source-rule diagnostics.
Pressure fixture for validation-html binding behavior over dynamic keyed writable source expressions.
Pressure harness includes validation issue and app-diagnostic summaries.
